title: Board ID, Item ID, and Subitem ID changed from 10 characters to 11 characters
excerpt: Hello, does anyone know or have any information on-site regarding the changes in data size/character length for the IDs?

posts.author: hakimrazali (muhammad hakim razali)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, does anyone know or have any information on-site regarding the changes in data size/character length for the IDs?

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml: The IDs are a simple count-up. I am quite sure that all items across a region (US, EU, AUS) or even globally are simply counted. Since we just broke 10 Billion items, the IDs now have one more digit.
